title: hieracium pseudofurcatum
intro: Hieracium pseudofurcatum, also known as the false furcate hawkweed, is a species of flowering plant in the dandelion-like hawkweed family. It has been used in traditional medicine for its purported medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antiseptic effects. The plant is said to offer various health benefits, such as relieving digestive issues and reducing fever, although more research is needed to confirm these claims. Herbal preparations of Hieracium pseudofurcatum can be found in some traditional medicine systems, often used in the form of teas, infusions, or tinctures.
